title: Origins void rasa
description: Recently I was thinking about how to create races for Minecraft. I had a similar idea for a long time, but it was raw (A demon who loves pain), but now there is a wonderful mod Origins.
body: Recently, I was thinking about how to create new races for Minecraft. I had a similar idea for a long time, which was still raw and undeveloped — like a demon who loves pain and suffering. But now I feel much more inspired and hopeful because of the amazing mod Origins. It opens up new possibilities for me, helping me better realize my ideas and making the process of creating more enjoyable and meaningful. It’s really nice to know that with this mod, I can bring my concepts to life and make the game even more interesting and unique for myself and other players.
